subcodes.first_line: The appellation 'Khusraw' is a title befitting sovereigns and the seal of crowned heads, yet the monarchs of this earthly realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خسروا این عنوان از القاب شهریارانست و طغرای تاج داران اما خسروان خاکدانرا
subcodes.subjects: @the ephemeral and the eternal, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
